calendar.matters:
Motion To Amend Judgment To Add Matt Harrison, Max Harrison And Horst Inman As Alter Ego Judgment Debtors
Off Calendar Jun-02-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF JOHN BROWN'S Motion To Amend Judgment To Add Matt Harrison, Max Harrison, And Horst Inman As Alter Ego Judgment Debtors.
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. (301/JLW/ju) Court Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-24-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-03-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assigned by the Master Calendar Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Margaret Ashwell.
Plaintiff: John Brown, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Max Inman and Defaulted Co-Defendant: Jmax Enterprises, Inc.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants.
Proposed Judgment submitted in court.
Matter is taken under submission.

Feb. 3, 2005
Judgment granted as follows:
Principal $1,935.30
Costs $383.80 and interest at the rate of 10% from the date of entry of Judgment until paid; and injunction listed in the Judgment, see scanned doc for details.
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-17-2004 Set For Trial On Jan-24-05 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion Of John Brown For Order To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted; Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-05-2004 Granted Per Written Order
